examples: One reason is straightforward: on many trees, the leaves that are the reddest are those on the side of the tree which gets most sun.
Here is the reddest rose in all the world. You will wear it to-night next your heart.
Over the weekend, he drew more than 14, 000 to an event in Idaho, the reddest of Republican red states.
She was also able to demonstrate that the reddest males were indeed the choosiest about who got to do the laying, and that they did prefer bigger females.
